stemHtml: You are flying a VFR flight in VMC in a controlled airspace. Suddenly, you experience a radio failure. You should (1) _____ and land (2) _____.

options.a: (1) Continue in VMC, and (2) at the nearest suitable airport.
options.b: (1) Stay in the control zone, and (2) as soon as possible.
options.c: (1) Fly at the minimum safe altitude, and (2) at the first aerodrome in sight.
options.d: (1) Descend below the control zone, and (2) at your destination.
